document:
Acorn Cloud Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@acorn.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 4 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: How many days after purchase can a customer request a refund?
